div1.entryFree:
Bubble, subst., small bladder of water: the b. reputation, As II, 7, 152. like --s in a latedisturbed stream, H4A II, 3, 62. a dream of what thou wert, a breath, a b. R3 IV, 4, 88. the earth hath --s, as the water has, Mcb. I, 3, 79. do but blow them to their trial, the --s are out, Hml. V, 2, 202.
Hence == cheat, humbug: if your lordship find him not a hilding, hold me no more in your respect. On my life, my lord, a b. All's III, 6, 5.
